sentences.arabic: رَأَى يُوسُفُ الْبَحْرَ لِأَوَّلِ مَرَّةٍ فِي حَيَاتِهِ.
sentences.translation: Jusuf je vidio more po prvi put u životu.
sentences.translationEn: Yusuf saw the sea for the first time in his life.

sentences.arabic: وَقَفَ عَلَى الشَّاطِئِ وَنَظَرَ إِلَى الْمَاءِ الْأَزْرَقِ.
sentences.translation: Stajao je na plaži i gledao u plavu vodu.
sentences.translationEn: He stood on the beach and looked at the blue water.

sentences.translation: Valovi su bili veliki a vjetar blag.
sentences.translationEn: The waves were big and the wind was light.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ فِي نَفْسِهِ: مَا أَجْمَلَ هَذَا الْمَكَانَ!
sentences.translation: Rekao je sebi: Kako je ovo mjesto lijepo!
sentences.translationEn: He said to himself: How beautiful this place is!
